extensionDescription.message: Open a new tab page display a Star Wars background based on the weather!

error_weather_unavailable.message: Unable to retrieve weather data right now.

alert_geolocation_error.message: Unable to retrieve your location. Please enable location services for this extension. Check the FAQ for more information.

planet_hoth_description.message: A World of Snow and Ice, Surrounded by Numerous Moons, and Home to Deadly Creatures like the Wampa.

planet_kamino_description.message: A Planet of Endless Oceans, Storms and Clones

planet_endor_description.message: Ewok Jerky is a Popular Snack in the Outer Rim

planet_dagobah_description.message: Refuge of Master Yoda, This is.

planet_scarif_description.message: A Remote, Tropical Planet in the Outer Rim

planet_tatooine_description.message: Go to Mos Eisley for a Drink

popup_newtab_hint.message: Choose which elements appear on the new tab page.

popup_permission_denied_search.message: Permission required. Toggle this on again to re-request.

popup_permission_denied_shortcuts.message: Permission required. Toggle this on again to re-request.

popup_subtitle.message: Thanks for using the extension! Choose your preferences below or explore more resources.

popup_manual_location_hint.message: If location access is blocked, search for a city (e.g., "Paris" or "Paris, FR") and choose a result.

popup_manual_location_error.message: Could not retrieve cities. Please try again.

popup_link_rate.message: Enjoying the extension? Rate it on the Chrome Web Store.

popup_link_bug.message: Found a bug? Open an issue on GitHub.

popup_link_source.message: Browse the source code or read the FAQ.

popup_link_author.message: Made by vwbosu, inspired by Tom Scott.

popup_link_survey.message: Take a quick survey or buy me a coffee.

onboarding_welcome_subtitle.message: Your new tab page will show weather conditions matched to Star Wars planets. Let's get you set up.

onboarding_location_title.message: How should we find your weather?

onboarding_location_subtitle.message: Choose how the extension determines your location.

onboarding_location_manual_hint.message: Type a city name to set your location

onboarding_auto_error.message: We couldn't access your location. Location services may be disabled.

onboarding_troubleshoot_chrome_steps.message: Go to Settings > Privacy and Security > Site Settings > Location, then enable "Sites can ask for your location".

onboarding_troubleshoot_mac_steps.message: Open System Settings > Privacy & Security > Location Services. Make sure it's turned on and Google Chrome is checked.

onboarding_troubleshoot_windows_steps.message: Open Settings > Privacy > Location and make sure location access is turned on.

onboarding_manual_no_results.message: No matching cities found. Try a different search.

onboarding_manual_error.message: Could not search for cities. Please try again.

onboarding_prefs_search_hint.message: Add a search bar to your new tab page

onboarding_prefs_shortcuts_hint.message: Show your most visited sites on your new tab page

onboarding_permission_denied.message: Permission required. Toggle this on again to re-request.

onboarding_done_subtitle.message: Open a new tab to see your Star Wars weather.

onboarding_done_hint.message: You can change these anytime from the extension settings.

onboarding_troubleshoot_faq_link.message: For detailed steps, see the full FAQ.

onboarding_done_bookmarks_tip.message: Bookmarks bar hidden? Press Ctrl+Shift+B (Cmd+Shift+B on Mac) to show it. Learn more

onboarding_done_faq_link.message: Have questions? Check the FAQ for tips on the Chrome footer, weather updates, and more.
